steps.title: Compare the given angles
steps.content: Triangle $ABC$ has angles $46^\circ$ and $109^\circ$. Triangle $JKL$ has corresponding angles $46^\circ$ and $109^\circ$.

steps.title: Apply angle angle similarity
steps.content: Two pairs of corresponding angles are already equal, so the triangles are similar by angle-angle similarity. No side length or third angle is needed. The answer is D.
